title: Full production rollout verification report
objective: Publish a structured post-rollout verification report confirming all client surfaces are stable on the platform API and Firebase can be safely decommissioned.
trigger: Completed after W7-02 Phase 5 (full cutover) and 72h stable observation window.

checks.check: npm run smoke (SMOKE_AUTH_MODE=optional) passes 100%
npm run rollout:ready passes 100%
/v1/health returning 200 for >= 72h with no gaps
Error rate (5xx) < 1% over 72h window
p95 latency < 800ms over 72h window
SELECT count(*) FROM requests r WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM request_status_events WHERE request_id=r.id) = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM request_status_events WHERE changed_at > now() = 0
SELECT count(*) FROM service_types WHERE is_active=true = 5
Total migrated requests match Firebase export count
No orphaned profiles (user_id FK all valid)
checks.query: SELECT count(*) FROM profiles p WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE id=p.user_id) = 0

verification_gates.name: Full UAT smoke test on production

checks.check: npm run uat (SMOKE_AUTH_MODE=required) with production token passes all checks
Request create -> status transition -> note -> timeline full path passes on production
Push token register/deregister round-trip passes on production
OTP registration flow functional on production (requires test OTP insertion)
Login, customer list, contractor assignment, activity summary all functional via platform API
Request list, history/timeline, note submission all functional via platform API
Request create, status update, image upload, push notification delivery all functional
Same as Android; OTP flow, request lifecycle, media upload all functional

verification_gates.name: Firebase traffic confirmation

checks.check: Firebase Firestore daily active reads at 0 for >= 24h
Firebase Cloud Functions invocation count at 0 for >= 24h
No active client sessions routing through Firebase (confirmed via flag audit)
Firebase Auth still active (not yet decommissioned until W7-04)

verification_gates.sign_off: Platform API operator + Firebase project owner

report_template.approved_for_w7_04_closeout_criteria: All 5 gates G1-G5 must pass with sign-off before W7-04 begins

rollback_decision_window: If G1 or G2 fail: trigger W7-02 rollback procedure. If G3/G4 fail: fix forward with targeted patch; do not roll back unless P0 incident open.
